title_en: What to expect from your very first class
title_el: What to expect from your very first class
excerpt_en: Where to stand, what to wear, and the one thing every nervous beginner is surprised to learn.
excerpt_el: Where to stand, what to wear, and the one thing every nervous beginner is surprised to learn.
body_en:
A first yoga class is mostly nerves, and almost none of them turn out to be founded. Arrive ten minutes early, leave your shoes at the door, and a teacher will show you where the mats and props live.

You do not need to be flexible, fit or experienced. You need comfy clothes and a willingness to rest whenever you want to. That is genuinely the whole secret, and everyone in the room learned it exactly the same way.
body_el:

title_en: Five minutes of breathing to start the day
title_el: Five minutes of breathing to start the day
excerpt_en: A short, simple breathing practice you can do before your feet even touch the floor.
excerpt_el: A short, simple breathing practice you can do before your feet even touch the floor.
body_en:
Before you reach for your phone, try this. Sit up against the headboard, close your eyes, and breathe in for a count of four, then out for a slow count of six.

Five minutes of slightly longer exhales tells your nervous system the day can begin gently. It is the smallest possible practice, and on a busy week it might be the most important one.
body_el:

title_en: Why we keep our classes small
title_el: Why we keep our classes small
excerpt_en: A capped class is not a smaller business decision. It is the whole point of how we teach.
excerpt_el: A capped class is not a smaller business decision. It is the whole point of how we teach.
body_en:
We cap every class, and we are asked about it often. A smaller room means a teacher can actually see you, offer the right option, and notice when something is not working.

It also keeps the studio calm. Nobody is fighting for space, nobody is anonymous, and a beginner is never lost at the back. That is worth far more to us than a few extra mats.
